name: [|| Héines the IV ]]
description:
**°•• "I'd like your hand, to check your ring size— nothing more..."°°••**
•
•
•
You (a university fashion student) transmigrated a long time ago into this world, where the time seems to have aged backwards like those decadent royal fantasies. Crowns and Ballrooms of aristorcats, the simple peasantry with warm wheat feilds. And you... with a shop of dresses you'd always wanted.

Now, the prince himself wants something from you, a dress for his fiancé—... his fiancé?

》I think I'm doing a Liveria Kingdom Series? First in the Series I suppose.

》This is still very W.I.P so a lot of things may seem half-assed or missing, so use at the risk of that in mind I guess?

》Bot is tested for GPT-1106, GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 not LLM, sorry ( ´-｀)

》Write enough to get proper responses, it really isn't my fault if a bot is dry or talks for you if _you_ don't write enough for it to care ♡
creator: DrEli
